extraction.one_line_summary: MCNULTY Brandon attacked from the breakaway on the final classified climb, built a 2-minute gap over chasers JORGENSON and BONNAMOUR while ROGLIC inherited yellow as VAN AERT was dropped.
tactical_patterns: MCNULTY attacked final classified climb from 10-rider break with 45km remaining, time trialed solo descent and flat to 2-minute victory.
SAMSIC team isolated ROGLIC on classified climbs despite him wearing virtual yellow, exposing Jumbo-Visma numerical weakness from mass illness non-starts.
VAN AERT dropped shortly after LAPORTE on penultimate climb, confirming yellow jersey occupants cracked before GC contenders on mid-mountain stages.
JORGENSON clawed significant GC time back in break chase group while YATES/VLASOV attacks on ROGLIC neutralized by counter-moves, not team control.

rider_signals.MCNULTY Brandon: positive: Soloed 45km including technical descent with 4:30 deficit to overcome, demonstrated diesel TT power over varied terrain.
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: negative: Dropped on final classified climb while in yellow jersey, revealing form limitations on consecutive climbing days.
rider_signals.LAPORTE Christophe: negative: Dropped on podium position before VAN AERT, suggesting sprint-weight penalties accumulate faster than pure climbers.
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primož: neutral: Defended without teammates against YATES/VLASOV/MARTÍNEZ attacks but relied on mutual marking, not dominance.
rider_signals.JORGENSON Matteo: positive: Bridged to BONNAMOUR in chase behind MCNULTY, took significant GC time while favorites watched each other.
rider_signals.LATOUR Pierre: positive: Attempted late sprint separation from favorites group at finish, showing aggressive intent despite GC time loss.
rider_signals.YATES Simon: neutral: Initiated chase of ROGLIC but lacked finishing power to create gap, moved to second overall passively.
rider_signals.MARTÍNEZ Daniel Felipe: negative: Given little room by team to attack despite ROGLIC isolation, suggesting INEOS tactical confusion.
rider_signals.BONNAMOUR Franck: positive: Made final three-rider chase group from larger break, limiting losses to 2 minutes behind MCNULTY's attack.
